title: Port ts_parser__compare_versions and fix GLR merge behavior
description:
Review of commit 65c6252 found two changes that don't match C tree-sitter:
1. Merge link swap (stack.go): C never reorders links. C tracks max precedence on StackNode. Our swap is invented behavior.
2. condenseStack worst-version search: C removes from back after pair-wise ts_parser__compare_versions. Our code skips this and compensates with a search loop.
Fix: Port ts_parser__compare_versions into the pair-wise comparison section, track max dynamic_precedence on StackNode, remove the link swap. Then condenseStack can use simple back-removal.
